scripts.dev: pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && tsx ./scripts/sync-dev-vars.ts && vite dev
scripts.dev:fresh: node ./scripts/ensure-dev-port.mjs && rm -rf node_modules/.vite && pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && tsx ./scripts/sync-dev-vars.ts && vite dev
scripts.build: pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && pnpm wrangler-types && vite build && tsx ./scripts/assert-turnstile-embed.ts
scripts.check: pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && pnpm wrangler-types && svelte-kit sync && pnpm -w exec vp check && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.fix: pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && pnpm wrangler-types && svelte-kit sync && pnpm -w exec vp check --fix && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: pnpm velite && pnpm ensure-env && pnpm wrangler-types && pnpm check && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY=0xTEST_SITE_KEY_EMBED vite build && PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY=0xTEST_SITE_KEY_EMBED tsx ./scripts/assert-turnstile-embed.ts
